France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies - BBC
articles.description: Emmanuel Macron said eight countries could enjoy protection from France's nuclear umbrella - but that Paris would retain sole decision-making power.
articles.content: He said eight other European countries the UK, Germany, Poland, the Netherlands, Belgium, Greece, Sweden and Denmark had agreed to participate in a new "advanced deterrence" strategy.
